headline: Building Robust Full-Stack Applications
intro: I offer end-to-end software engineering services for startups and enterprises. From system architecture to production deployment, I deliver scalable, maintainable solutions.

services.title: Full-Stack Development
services.description: Build complete web applications from database to UI. I specialize in creating robust systems using modern tech stacks.

services.title: Backend Systems
services.description: Design and build scalable backend services. I have expertise in building resilient microservices and APIs.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.description: Deploy and maintain applications on cloud platforms. Infrastructure as code, CI/CD, and containerization.

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: Create modern, responsive user interfaces with performance and accessibility in mind.

services.title: Technical Architecture
services.description: Design systems that scale. I help you plan the right tech stack and structure for your project.

services.title: Code Review & Mentoring
services.description: Improve code quality and help your team grow. Architecture reviews and engineering mentorship.

workExperience: 10+ years building production systems at scale, mentoring engineering teams, and delivering reliable software.
availability: Available for contract, freelance, or consulting engagements.
